category_sources: source_facts.description says terminal-based HTTP/REST client; official Slumber documentation describes terminal UI and CLI modes for REST and HTTP clients.
display_name_sources: Official documentation title and source_facts.name use Slumber/slumber.
docs_sources: Official Slumber documentation provides introduction, getting started, and request collection reference pages.

tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation identify Slumber as a terminal HTTP client with TUI/CLI modes and YAML request collections.
